headline: Eli Lilly highlights late-stage momentum for oral GLP-1 candidate orforglipron
summary: Company update emphasized continued phase 3 execution for orforglipron in obesity and type 2 diabetes.

headline: Analyst note flags intensifying oral GLP-1 competition in cardiometabolic disease
summary: Secondary analysis inferred that oral GLP-1 differentiation will depend on tolerability, manufacturing scale, and cardiovascular evidence maturity.
